summary: Iteration 42: Tested vibrant UI overhaul for Bruno Melito Hair salon app. All features verified working: Dashboard module cards with solid gradient backgrounds, stat cards with larger icons, dark Today/Upcoming sections, public website with alternating dark/light sections, solid colored promo cards, glass-morphism contact cards, dark footer, 6 theme presets in Settings, login flow, and booking flow.
passed_tests: === PUBLIC WEBSITE (/sito) ===
1. Website landing page loads - PASS: data-testid='website-landing' found
2. Hero section - PASS: Dark background with BRUNO MELITO HAIR title
3. Hero PRENOTA ORA button - PASS: Pink button visible and clickable
4. Promotions section - PASS: 7 promo cards with solid colored backgrounds (pink, teal, purple, amber, blue)
5. Loyalty section - PASS: 5 reward tiers with vibrant solid gradient backgrounds (amber, rose, teal, violet, sky)
6. Contact section - PASS: Dark background with glass-morphism cards
7. Contact buttons - PASS: PRENOTA ORA (pink), WHATSAPP (green), CHIAMA (pink outline) all found
8. Footer - PASS: Dark background with social links
=== LOGIN FLOW ===
9. Login page loads - PASS: Email and password inputs found
10. Login with admin@brunomelito.it - PASS: Successfully logged in and redirected
=== DASHBOARD ===
11. Dashboard page loads - PASS: data-testid='dashboard-page' found
12. Stat cards - PASS: 5 stat cards with vibrant gradient backgrounds (pink, teal, amber, blue, purple)
13. Stat card icons - PASS: Larger icons (w-8 h-8) in white/20 backdrop containers
14. Module cards - PASS: 19 module cards with solid gradient backgrounds
15. Module card icons - PASS: Larger icons (w-7 h-7) with hover animations
16. New Appointment button - PASS: Pink gradient button found
17. Today section - PASS: Dark background (#1A1A2E to #2D2B55) with appointment list
18. Upcoming section - PASS: Dark teal background (#0C4A6E to #164E63) with upcoming appointments
=== MODULE NAVIGATION ===
19. Week module click - PASS: Navigated to /week page
20. Clients module click - PASS: Navigated to /clients page
=== SETTINGS PAGE ===
21. Settings page loads - PASS: data-testid='settings-page' found
22. Theme presets - PASS: 6 presets found (Elettrico, Fuoco, Lusso, Smeraldo, Scuro, Rosa Vivace)
23. Color pickers - PASS: Primary, Sidebar BG, Sidebar Text, Accent, Page BG, Page Text all found
24. Save theme button - PASS: Found
25. Reset theme button - PASS: Found
=== BOOKING FLOW ===
26. PRENOTA ORA click - PASS: Opens booking form
27. Service categories - PASS: 7 categories with solid colored backgrounds
28. Service list - PASS: Services displayed when category expanded
29. Back button - PASS: Found in booking form
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx: Module cards correctly use solid gradient backgrounds with from/to colors. Icons are larger (w-7 h-7). Stat cards have vibrant gradients.
Dashboard.jsx: Today section uses dark gradient (#1A1A2E to #2D2B55). Upcoming section uses dark teal (#0C4A6E to #164E63).
WebsitePage.jsx: Promotions section uses solid colored backgrounds (T.primary, T.accent, #8B5CF6, #F59E0B, #0EA5E9).
WebsitePage.jsx: Loyalty section uses vibrant solid gradient backgrounds (amber, rose, teal, violet, sky).
WebsitePage.jsx: Contact section uses dark background (T.text + F0 opacity) with glass-morphism cards.
SettingsPage.jsx: 6 theme presets correctly defined (Elettrico, Fuoco, Lusso, Smeraldo, Scuro, Rosa Vivace).
Minor console warning: HTML hydration warning about span inside select/option - not blocking functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 42 verified vibrant UI overhaul. Key changes: Dashboard module cards now have solid gradient backgrounds (not white+border). Stat cards have larger icons (w-8 h-8). Today/Upcoming sections have dark backgrounds. Public website sections alternate dark/light. Promotions have solid colored backgrounds. Loyalty cards have vibrant gradient backgrounds. Contact section has dark bg with glass cards. Footer is dark. 6 theme presets available in Settings (Elettrico, Fuoco, Lusso, Smeraldo, Scuro, Rosa Vivace).
